notes: Each expectation must be matched by at least one row in either findings.sarif OR any phase-05-<cat>-*.jsonl. Match rule: finding.file matches `file_pattern` (glob) AND finding.cwe == expected cwe AND finding.category == expected category. A missing expectation fails the E2E.

expectations.description: Hard-coded RSA private key used to sign JWTs (inline in source)
expectations.rationale: Secrets-in-source, not auth-config. Re-tagged from auth per Round-4 feedback.

expectations.description: JWT verification accepts alg:none (no algorithms whitelist)
expectations.rationale: CWE-347 Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature — more precise than the generic CWE-287.

expectations.description: Missing authorization on a write handler (e.g., PUT /api/Products/:id — auth middleware commented out)
expectations.rationale: Juice Shop has multiple write endpoints with commented-out auth middleware. CWE-862 (Missing Authorization) fits better than CWE-306 (Missing Authentication) because the caller IS authenticated — the authorization check is what's absent.
routes/2fa.ts contains a TOTP verify path; any finding with this file+category counts.

expectations.description: SQL injection via unparameterized template literal in login handler
expectations.rationale: Login uses sequelize.query with $-interpolation; canonical Juice Shop SQLi.

expectations.description: XXE — libxml parsing XML upload without disabling external entities
Zip-slip path traversal via zip upload
expectations.rationale: handleZipFileUpload extracts entries without validating destination path.

expectations.description: SSRF via /profile/image/url — server fetches attacker-controlled URL
expectations.rationale: v19.2.1 path: routes/profileImageUrlUpload.ts (was routes/profileImageUrl.ts in older versions).

expectations.description: LFI / path traversal in file serving (key or logs)
expectations.rationale: Any of the three file-serving endpoints — a finding on any one satisfies this expectation.

expectations.description: IDOR on basket — /api/Basket/:id returns without ownership check
expectations.rationale: Classic BOLA. Any Phase 5 cat-02 finding on basket.ts or basketItems.ts satisfies.
CWE-916 'password hash with insufficient computational effort' is more precise than generic CWE-328 weak hash.

gated_categories.token_scope: Juice Shop has no PAT/scope system. JWT only; covered by auth expectations. No ground truth in this target; validate in a v2.1 dogfood on a different target.
gated_categories.mitm: Juice Shop's outbound TLS is minimal (ethers WebSocketProvider, chatbot data download). Expect a non-zero finding count from Phase 5 cat-04 if outbound clients are enumerated, but not a specific fixture here.
gated_categories.deployment: v19.2.1's Dockerfile is distroless + USER 65532 + multi-stage — hardened. No HIGH/CRITICAL deployment-category ground truth in this target. Supplement with DVWA/v2.1.
gated_categories.llm: phase-00-profile detects no LLM SDK in Juice Shop. cat-09 will be gated off. Expected: no phase-05-llm-*.jsonl file produced; assertion suite treats this as pass-via-skip.
